zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Wentworth於1478年7月22日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，她的父親Sir Henry Wentworth46歲，母親Anne Saye25歲。她於1494年10月22日與Sir John Seymour在英國維爾爾布爾巴結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年10月18日在英國維爾爾布爾巴享年72歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Wentworth于1478年7月22日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，她的父亲Sir Henry Wentworth46岁，母亲Anne Saye25岁。她于1494年10月22日与Sir John Seymour在英国維爾爾布爾巴结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1550年10月18日在英国維爾爾布爾巴享年72岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Wentworth was born on 22 July 1478, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry Wentworth, was 46 and her mother, Anne Saye, was 25. She married Sir John Seymour on 22 October 1494, in Burbage, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 18 October 1550, in Burbage, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Wentworth est née le 22 juillet 1478, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Wentworth, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anne Saye, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Seymour le 22 octobre 1494, à Burbage, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1550, à Burbage, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.Wulfhall, Savernake Forest, Wiltshire, E: Savernake Forest, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Wentworth am 22. Juli 1478 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Wentworth 46 und ihre Mutter Anne Saye 25. Sie hat am 22. Oktober 1494 in Burbage, Wiltshire, England Sir John Seymour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1550 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Burbage, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Wentworth è nata il il 22 luglio 1478 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Henry Wentworth, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Anne Saye, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Seymour il 22 ottobre 1494, nel Burbage, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1550, nel Burbage, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Wentworthが1478年7月22日にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Wentworthは46歳，母Anne Sayeは25歳であった。1494年10月22日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブルバッジでSir John Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1550年10月18日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブルバッジで72歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Wentworth(이)가 1478년 7월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Wentworth(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Saye(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1494년 10월 22일 영국 윌츠히르 버바지에서 Sir John Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 10월 18일 영국 윌츠히르 버바지에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 그리트 베드윈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Wentworth nasceu em 22 de julho de 1478, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Wentworth, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anne Saye, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Seymour em 22 de outubro de 1494, em Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1550, em Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Wulfhall, Savernake Forest, Wiltshire, E: Savernake Forest, Wiltshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Wentworth родилась 22 июля 1478 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Wentworth было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Saye, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Seymour 22 октября 1494 г. в местности бурбадж, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 18 октября 1550 г. в местности бурбадж, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Wentworth nació el 22 de julio de 1478, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry Wentworth, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Anne Saye, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir John Seymour el 22 de octubre de 1494, en Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1550, en Burbage, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
